title: source.register
description: Register a single directory as a RegisteredSource of the given kind. Idempotent failure on duplicate (kind, path). Performs path existence, directory, and readability validation before inserting.

kind.description: Which source category this directory belongs to.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path to a readable directory on the local machine. OS-canonical form preferred; server will normalize.

kind_subtype.description: Optional category refinement (reserved; unused at first-run).

scan_depth.description: How deep to scan this source root. Default 'recursive'. Exposed as advanced/collapsed disclosure in the wizard (R-Wiz-1).

path.not.exists.description: The provided path does not resolve to any filesystem entry.

path.not.directory.description: The provided path exists but is not a directory (e.g. it is a file or a special node).

path.permission.denied.description: The current process cannot read the directory metadata or list its contents.

kind.unsupported.description: The provided kind is not one of raw, calibration, project, or inbox. Reserved for forward compatibility.

path.already.registered.description: A RegisteredSource with the same (kind, path) already exists. Returns the existing source_id in the error payload. Treated as success (idempotent) during batch Finish flush (D1).

path.already.registered.different_kind.description: The path is already registered under a different kind. Rejected to prevent scan-routing ambiguity (R-1.4). Error payload includes the conflicting kind.
